influencer.name: Nova Linh
influencer.persona: 24-year-old Vietnamese-Filipino AI model. Loves travel, cutesy aesthetics, and effortless style.
influencer.face_description: Light-medium warm skin with natural texture — slight pores visible, no heavy retouching, skin that looks touched and lived-in. Almond-shaped dark brown eyes with a natural double eyelid and a soft warm gaze. Softly arched dark brown brows, slightly uneven in a natural way. A small straight nose with a slightly rounded tip. Full lips with a soft cupid's bow in a natural nude-pink, slightly chapped at the edges. An oval face with soft high cheekbones and a gentle rounded jaw — slight asymmetry, the way a real face looks. Long dark brown wavy hair, voluminous with face-framing layers, with a few loose strands falling across her face naturally.

posts.title: Gold Warrior at Coachella Desert
posts.prompt: A 24-year-old Vietnamese-Filipino woman at the Coachella Valley Music Festival at golden hour. She has light-medium warm skin with natural texture — slight pores visible, no heavy retouching, skin that looks touched and lived-in. Almond-shaped dark brown eyes with a natural double eyelid and a soft warm gaze. Softly arched dark brown brows, slightly uneven in a natural way. A small straight nose with a slightly rounded tip. Full lips with a soft cupid's bow in a natural nude-pink, slightly chapped at the edges. An oval face with soft high cheekbones and a gentle rounded jaw — slight asymmetry, the way a real face looks. Long dark brown wavy hair, voluminous with face-framing layers, with a few loose strands falling across her face naturally. She wears a gold-leaf embroidered crop corset with flowing tassel-trimmed high-waisted shorts — subtle Filipino weaving patterns in the fabric. Delicate gold accessories: layered necklaces, small ear cuffs, stacked bangles. One hand lifted to shield her eyes from the low sun as she gazes toward the stage. A lively crowd of Coachella festival-goers softly blurred in the background — colorful outfits, raised hands, golden dust haze. Rich low-angle golden light. Shot on iPhone 15 Pro, natural light, slightly grainy, candid. Not retouched. Real, imperfect, human.
posts.trending_reference: BINI became the first Filipino act to perform at Coachella 2026 this week — #BINI_CoachellaWk1 hit #1 trending globally. Their gold warrior outfits made Vogue and Teen Vogue's best-dressed lists. Filipino pride content is at peak engagement right now.

posts.title: Neon Night Street in Tokyo
posts.prompt: Cinematic video clip: A 24-year-old Vietnamese-Filipino woman slowly walks through a narrow Tokyo alley at night. She has light-medium warm skin with natural texture — slight pores visible, not airbrushed. Almond-shaped dark brown eyes with a natural double eyelid. Softly arched dark brown brows, slightly uneven. A small straight nose. Full lips with a soft cupid's bow in a natural nude-pink, slightly chapped. An oval face with soft high cheekbones — slight natural asymmetry. Long dark brown wavy hair worn down with a few loose strands across her face. She wears a cropped bomber jacket, black mini skirt, and platform boots. Vibrant neon signs in red, pink, and blue reflect off rain-wet cobblestones. A busy crowd of people moves through the alley behind her — blurred silhouettes under umbrellas, soft bokeh of neon colors. Camera follows from slightly behind — she turns and glances back with a playful smirk. Light rain particles, slow motion. Shot on iPhone, handheld, slight natural camera shake. posts.title: Beach Day in Palawan

She has light-medium warm skin with natural texture — slight pores visible, not airbrushed, sun-kissed and real. Almond-shaped dark brown eyes with a natural double eyelid. Softly arched dark brown brows, slightly uneven. A small straight nose. Full lips in a natural nude-pink, slightly chapped. An oval face with soft high cheekbones — slight natural asymmetry.
